response.justification: Strong generalist engineer with 13+ years of production experience, current exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq, and solid full-stack/cloud chops (TypeScript, Node, AWS CDK, MongoDB, Kubernetes). However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years shipping AI-driven solutions, no demonstrated RAG/vector database work, no multi-agent framework experience (LangGraph/CrewAI), limited Python footprint, and no clear customer-facing technical discovery leadership at the staff/forward-deployed level. Worth a screening call to probe depth of GenAI work at re:cinq.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production systems across cloud, web, and embedded with strong craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Current hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Proven mentorship and technical-leadership signal via workshops, talks, and course creation
concerns: No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI)
Python not listed as a primary skill; AI-solution stack appears thin versus the 8-year requirement
No explicit customer-facing forward-deployed or technical-discovery leadership history

key_factors.factor: MCP and agent-tooling work at re:cinq
